textByHash.26700d8104aacc4738e4305cd06b38fb5880f1ee: The battle is far from over. If you have a pure heart you will help us win.
textByHash.508999c90ef2e4ac6ae9668eeaebb2dbb82f0104: They caught me spying on the stronghold. They beat and tortured me.
textByHash.6bd3136285e4c4f74ca1b1f8ff4b6a7d71b13012: But I didn't crack. I told them nothing. They can't break me!
textByHash.f799bc654690233fa543d6158a4f520df63aeae7: Don't be. I have the position of the stronghold!
textByHash.3290e993e75193c8d5111a1b64254bc96368ab7b: Now leave before they find you and all is lost.
textByHash.6100276fc5439b4f6cbf1463515bb285689893bc: Well done, you've broken down their defences. This battle must be ours.
textByHash.ac19f664e082a456dd70f70ff205c94f1789ba1f: Now we have the orb I'm much better. Soon my comrades will come and free me.
textByHash.c3220c8250f6151a8e6af9948626c93c7f1c3884: When will this battle end? I feel like I've been locked up my whole life.
textByHash.e06912358207e82e45ed5e47e5ec2d8740b58ec6: I can't talk now. If the guards catch me I'll be dead gnome meat.
